title: Monday AI Assistant availability
excerpt: I am the admin for the account and still cannot find the AI Assistant. I’ve tried looking in the labs and it’s not there. Is this still in a gradual release for some accounts?

posts.author: bglick (Bradley Glick)
posts.cookedHtml: I am the admin for the account and still cannot find the AI Assistant. I’ve tried looking in the labs and it’s not there. Is this still in a gradual release for some accounts?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Bradley,

monday AI Assistant is still in gradual release at this stage however I’ve reached out for some more concrete information regarding when you can expect to see it in your account

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for your patience Bradley!

I have had confirmation that AI Assistant was released to basic, standard and pro account in EU or US. If you’re currently on our Enterprise plan, you’re welcome to DM me with your email so I can check on your account to get this granted

posts.author: Runy (Runy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi I’m an administrator. And I still cannot find the AI Assistant that helps you create tasks. I have just used the AI automations to categorize and it works great… So now I want to move on an add tasks.

Is there a step by step article how to enable this AI and use it?

posts.author: Runy (Runy)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to access the AI assistent through an API and can you use your own Large Language Models Agents? I can program in Python and I use Langchain library. There is a development going on the create Agentic workflows where you have more AI agents working in a team and automating your process. What are the views of Monday about this topic. Look at Crew AI on Youtube where they program an AI agent team that solves problems. I think Monday.com can look at this and I suggest we see how we can use this new technology. I see already a team of AI agents helping clients with project management and reviewing tasks on top of the Monday Workflow OS.
